mapper.sql: select line_id, line_name, start_stop, end_stop, summer_depart_time, summer_arrive_time, winter_depart_time, winter_arrive_time, stop_list from dim_lines
mapper.select: SELECT line_id as lineId, line_name as lineName, start_stop as startStop, end_stop as endStop, summer_depart_time as summerDepartTime, winter_depart_time as winterDepartTime FROM dim_lines ORDER BY line_name
SELECT '公交线路' as lineType, COUNT(*) as count FROM dim_lines

SELECT d.line_id as lineId, d.line_name as lineName, d.start_stop as startStop, d.end_stop as endStop, d.summer_depart_time as summerDepartTime, d.summer_arrive_time as summerArriveTime, d.winter_depart_time as winterDepartTime, d.winter_arrive_time as winterArriveTime, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.stop_name) FROM dim_route_station_details s WHERE s.line_name = d.line_name) as stationCount FROM dim_lines d WHERE d.line_name = #{lineName}
